title: Yoshb@qashah #3436
definition:
Joshbekashah = "seated in hardness"

 1) son of Heman and the leader of the 17th course of musicians
nasbUsage:
Definition: Joshbekashah = "seated in hardness"

 1) son of Heman and the leader of the 17th course of musicians

    NASB:  a hard seat, a son of Heman
